tranches.capability_boundary: Domain partition keys, source-owned Kafka capacity, ordered replay, partition migration, and source-freshness scheduling
tranches.tranche_decision: Tranche 2 retains throughput tuning, valuation-job lock ordering, exact runtime certification, and aggregate documentation closure.
local_evidence: 84 focused partition, Kafka runtime-contract, replay, ingestion-targeting, and source-scheduling tests pass at the tranche code head
remote_evidence: PR #800 merged by the approved rebase/non-squash method; exact main b9c55792361557bda56ba498492e962225557dd4 passed local architecture, migration, documentation, and wiki parity validation

tranches.capability_boundary: Transactional hot-path throughput, twelve-way capacity, valuation-job lock ordering, and exact workload certification
local_evidence: Focused #799 unit, domain, lint, format, and type checks pass at signed campaign commits through 349ee126c66415c9bf683baa43b51656e6c8905d
Exact daily 20260717T092348Z made all 100,000 source transactions durable but only 83,644 valuation snapshots before the fixed drain deadline; this is a valid transaction-processing capacity failure

Exact-head daily 20260717T125841Z made all 100,000 source transactions durable but only 82,014 valuation snapshots; cost, cashflow, and valuation-ready topic counts tie the remaining tail to transaction processing, while attempts stayed 2/2, repeats stayed 0, failed outbox stayed 0, and governed logs stayed error-free

Cost-reference coalescing at signed 2d49fc8f144b6845a862d067cc689ce2bbad5119 passed 105 focused unit, 74 contract, and 2 real PostgreSQL tests and improved same-host diagnostic fan-in 3.97 percent versus parent

Position-state creation at signed a3c9eeaace53e65d0e5892ba2a20c28a162d02aa reduced the absent-key path from two statements to one, but exact fan-in 20260717T152820Z drained in 110.369 seconds and did not improve the 105.470-second parent baseline

Initial-opening-lot persistence at signed b7e7e1be230fb80337dbe19e75e5e84bcef5159a reduced ordinary first-BUY PostgreSQL statement count from ten to nine, but exact fan-in 20260717T155339Z was neutral at 110.334 seconds; another daily run and further query-level micro-optimization are not justified without stronger material-bottleneck evidence

Stage-attributed certifying fan-in 20260717T162223Z passed at exact signed head 20333978aa0f52d62032334bc9b474edd3c9f4ab with 110.416-second drain and exact reconciliation; cost contributed 37.18 percent of whole-transaction duration, idempotency 17.69 percent, position 17.37 percent, cashflow 11.72 percent, readiness 9.21 percent, and commit 6.64 percent

Internal cost diagnostic at signed head 37abbf19b293e9e720fa704d04fcd737fc4d239d proved 1000 FIFO full rebuilds had depth one and only 0.18031266846810468 seconds of pure recalculation time; the wider cost stage is database, persistence, or coordination work, so calculator optimization is not justified

The same diagnostic reached 1000 COMPLETE valuation jobs with attempt count 2 and zero Kafka lag but produced zero snapshots or downstream rows while logging 1000 lost-ownership outcomes; it is terminal diagnostic evidence, not a capacity result

Signed 6640ec911a31d722410b678de54f415433f469f2 makes the load gate fail fast when drained COMPLETE valuation jobs lack their atomic same-scope snapshots; 19 focused tests plus MyPy, Ruff, format, and diff checks passed

Exact clean fan-in 20260717T174251Z passed at signed evidence head d34da93054c56897c317dbdeb7a1c7a595a432c7 with 105.622-second drain, exact 1000 transaction and derived-row reconciliation, attempts 2/2, zero repeated processing, closed jobs and outbox, and no recurrence of the terminal ownership anomaly

Pure FIFO recalculation in 20260717T174251Z totalled only 0.160816 seconds at depth one while the wider cost stage totalled 194.163301 seconds; database, persistence, or coordination evidence is required before another cost-path change

Signed 37ffa2fadd37662c34d6f2ae66e7455d1bbd8cb7 retains eleven existing low-cardinality repository/method database timing series in the governed artifact and fails closed on missing, incomplete, or zero-observation evidence; 32 focused tests plus scoped MyPy, Ruff, format, and diff checks passed

Exact clean fan-in 20260717T180631Z reproduced the terminal ownership contradiction: 1000 durable transactions and COMPLETE valuation jobs with attempts 2/2, zero repeats, and final outbox 0/0 produced zero snapshots or timeseries rows; the guard failed in 314.102 seconds instead of consuming the full drain timeout

Database timing in 20260717T180631Z totalled 139.978303 seconds across eleven repository operations while pure FIFO recalculation totalled 0.152853 seconds; this narrows future work to targeted persistence, coordination, and valuation ownership-transition proof without attributing the defect to a specific lock or UPSERT

The next investigation requires database, persistence, or coordination timing evidence and a runtime explanation for the valuation ownership anomaly before any further hot-path change or daily rerun; ordered append, full rebuild, method-specific lot state, backdated and correction semantics, and single-writer coordination remain mandatory
Exact daily, recovery, poison, duplicate, price-restatement, and FX-restatement completion evidence remains required before PR readiness
